Name: Material Miracle
Description: Next material condition will be <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Good<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Sturdy<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Centered<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Pliant<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Primed<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, or <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Malleable<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.

Name: Ground Support
Description: Participating in this operation as ground support.

Name: Carrot Power
Description: Hypercarrot Cannon is primed for use.

Name: Star Contributor
Description: Bearing proof of exceptional contributions made during a period of cosmic exploration. In effect only when playing as a Disciple of the Hand or Land.

Name: Now Boarding
Description: Pilot is being transferred to the appropriate operational mech.
